
C:\Users\qianw\Documents\GitHub\Utowoo.github.io\themes\archer\node_modules\uws>if not defined npm_config_node_gyp (node "C:\Users\qianw\AppData\Roaming\npm\node_modules\npm\node_modules\npm-lifecycle\node-gyp-bin\\..\..\node_modules\node-gyp\bin\node-gyp.js" rebuild )  else (node "C:\Users\qianw\AppData\Roaming\npm\node_modules\npm\node_modules\node-gyp\bin\node-gyp.js" rebuild )
